nasb.text: Let those be ashamed and dishonored who seek my life; Let those be turned back and humiliated who devise evil against me.

esv.text: Let them be put to shame and dishonor who seek after my life! Let them be turned back and disappointed who devise evil against me!

cnv.text: 願那些尋索我命的，蒙羞受辱； 願設計陷害我的，退後羞愧。

ccb.text: 愿谋杀我的人蒙羞受辱， 谋害我的人落荒而逃！

csbs.text: 愿那些寻索我命的，蒙羞受辱； 愿那些设计加害我的，后退羞惭。
